name: freecut
description: Local-first source-available non-commercial short-form video editor with FFmpeg exports.

scripts.start:build: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.qa:import-transition: npm run build && playwright test tests/freecut-import-transition.spec.ts
scripts.qa:runtime: npm run build && playwright test tests/freecut-runtime.spec.ts
scripts.qa:smoke: npm run build && playwright test tests/project-schema.spec.ts tests/freecut-runtime.spec.ts tests/freecut-import-transition.spec.ts tests/freecut-shortcuts.spec.ts tests/freecut-command-palette.spec.ts tests/freecut-guided.spec.ts tests/freecut-export-job.spec.ts tests/freecut-export-output.spec.ts
